overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character walking through a coastal town at night. The character proceeds along a dirt path past wooden buildings and street lamps toward a lighthouse, eventually descending to a wooden dock with moored boats.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal town street with wooden storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt street toward the lighthouse, passing wooden buildings

notable_agents.action: horse tied to a post outside a building, standing still

entered.detail: tall stone lighthouse with glowing beacon at the top
row of wooden western-style buildings with warm lantern light in windows
weathered wooden planks and posts along the water's edge
tall wooden pole with glowing lantern illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt street in a coastal town at night. To the right stand wooden buildings with warm lights, while to the left a waterfront boardwalk runs alongside the water. A lighthouse glows in the distance, and a horse is tied to a post on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal path with scattered wooden debris and wagons

events.description: a rider on horseback passes by from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as a mounted rider passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback trotting past from right to left along the street

entered.detail: old wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked on the side
simple wooden post fence running along the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt path as the town buildings thin out. A rider on horseback passes by from right to left. Wooden wagons and debris line the left side of the path as the lighthouse grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with moored boats near the lighthouse

events.description: descending wooden steps from grassy terrain down to the dock

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden steps from the grassy path toward the boats moored at the dock

entered.detail: wooden boats with cabin structures docked at the pier
weathered wooden steps leading down from the path to the water level
wooden planking of the dock surface extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the town street behind and walks along a grassy path toward the lighthouse. Descending wooden steps to a dock, the scene opens to reveal moored boats floating on the dark water. The lighthouse now looms close on the left as the character reaches the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet coastal town at night that gradually opens into a waterfront dock beneath a towering lighthouse. It begins on a dirt street lined with warm-lit wooden buildings and a tied horse, with a boardwalk running parallel to the dark water. As the character continues forward, the town buildings thin out and a rider on horseback passes by, while the path becomes cluttered with wooden wagons and debris. The scene then shifts from the street to a grassy trail as the lighthouse grows larger in the frame, before the camera descends a set of wooden steps. Finally, the view expands to reveal moored boats floating on the water as the character reaches the dock with the lighthouse looming closely on the left.
